overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character exploring a fantasy landscape. The character walks through a sword graveyard beneath a burning red sky with a massive glowing tree, then transitions to a grassy field with ancient stone ruins and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway through sword graveyard beneath burning sky

events.description: entering area with giant swords planted in the ground on both sides of path
character stops walking and looks up at the red sky and glowing tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along stone path, passing wooden fences and entering sword graveyard, then pausing to look up at the sky

entered.detail: massive glowing tree with red and yellow canopy dominating the sky
weathered wooden fence posts lining the stone path
enormous stone swords planted upright in the ground like grave markers
tall stone tower structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone path lined with wooden fences through an open landscape. The sky burns with red and orange hues from a massive glowing tree. The character enters a graveyard of giant stone swords planted in the ground and pauses to look up at the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy highland with ancient stone ruins and autumn foliage

events.description: fade to black and transition to new location with grassy field and stone arch ruins
walking past dead bodies lying in the grass on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and autumn trees toward ancient ruins, passing fallen corpses on the left

entered.detail: massive ancient stone structure with multiple arches partially covered in mist
tall dark tower with intense red glow emanating from the top against the sky
large tree with bright yellow golden foliage glowing against the red sky
trees with orange and red autumn leaves scattered across the landscape
fallen bodies lying in the grass wearing dark clothing and armor

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade to black, the scene opens to a wide grassy field with autumn-colored trees and massive stone arch ruins in the distance. A tall tower burns with red light in the center while a golden tree glows on the right. The character walks past dead bodies lying in the grass as they explore the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open landscape that transitions from a rural path into a surreal graveyard of colossal weaponry. It begins with the character walking along a stone path lined with wooden fences under a sky burning with red and orange hues from a massive glowing tree. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts into a dense field of giant stone swords planted firmly in the ground. The scene then culminates as the character pauses amidst the towering blades, turning their gaze upward toward the radiant, fiery expanse of the sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate fantasy landscape that blends autumn beauty with signs of ancient war. It begins as the view fades in to reveal a wide grassy field dotted with autumn-colored trees and massive stone arch ruins looming in the distance. As the character advances, the camera tracks past fallen bodies strewn across the grass, emphasizing the stillness of the wasteland. The scene then expands to highlight the horizon, where a tall tower burns with an intense red light while a massive golden tree glows brilliantly to the right.
